title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a multi-model workflow where Claude Opus handles reasoning and planning while Gemini 3.5 Flash specializes in frontend UI design. The approach routes each development phase to the model best suited for it, improving output quality and cost efficiency compared to using a single model throughout.
